principles.bodyEs: La IA sin un flujo gobernado produce outputs bonitos que nadie usa. Los flujos existen para que cada output tenga dueno, fecha y criterio de exito.
principles.bodyEn: AI without a governed flow produces pretty outputs nobody uses. The flows exist so every output has an owner, a date, and a success criterion.

principles.bodyEs: Cada artefacto es una decision que no se pierde. {{PILOT_METRIC_STATEMENT}}
principles.bodyEn: Every artifact is a decision that doesn't get lost. {{PILOT_METRIC_STATEMENT}}

principles.bodyEs: Un output sin nombre es un output que nadie defiende. Cada artefacto que produces lleva tu firma profesional — eso es lo que separa ejecucion de excelencia.
principles.bodyEn: An output without a name is an output nobody defends. Every artifact you produce carries your professional signature — that's what separates execution from excellence.

accountabilityCascadeCallout.titleEs: Accountability Cascade — recuerda los anti-patrones finales
accountabilityCascadeCallout.titleEn: Accountability Cascade — remember the final anti-patterns
accountabilityCascadeCallout.bodyEs: Cada output que compartes lleva tu nombre. Output sin dueno, decision sin fecha, artefacto sin criterio de exito — estos tres anti-patrones destruyen la confianza del equipo mas rapido que cualquier error tecnico.
accountabilityCascadeCallout.bodyEn: Every output you share carries your name. Output without owner, decision without date, artifact without success criteria — these three anti-patterns destroy team trust faster than any technical error.

nextSteps.bodyEs: Elige {{CORE_FLOW_1}} y {{CORE_FLOW_2}}. Ejecutalos en tu proxima situacion real. Guarda los outputs en Drive.
nextSteps.bodyEn: Pick {{CORE_FLOW_1}} and {{CORE_FLOW_2}}. Run them in your next real situation. Save the outputs in Drive.

nextSteps.bodyEs: Incorpora {{CORE_FLOWS}} a tu rutina semanal. Los artefactos se vuelven tu lenguaje operativo. Configura tu infraestructura ({{INFRA_FLOWS}}).
nextSteps.bodyEn: Incorporate {{CORE_FLOWS}} into your weekly routine. The artifacts become your operational language. Set up your infrastructure ({{INFRA_FLOWS}}).

nextSteps.bodyEs: Crea tus propios flujos con {{MASTER_FLOW}}. Ya dominas el sistema — ahora lo extiendes para tus necesidades especificas. Eso es Ri.
nextSteps.bodyEn: Create your own flows with {{MASTER_FLOW}}. You've mastered the system — now you extend it for your specific needs. That's Ri.

_composerNotes: Placeholders: {{AUTHOR}}, {{AUDIENCE}}, {{TEAM}}, {{INITIATIVE}}, {{VERSION}}, {{PILOT_NAME}}, {{PILOT_RESULTS}}, {{PILOT_METRIC_STATEMENT}}, {{ACKNOWLEDGMENTS_ES/EN}}, {{CORE_FLOW_*}}, {{MASTER_FLOW}}, {{INFRA_FLOWS}} are all resolved from the manifest meta and flows arrays. The three principles and accountability cascade are generic to any playbook.
